title: coronilla heterophylla
intro: Coronilla heterophylla, also known as broom or Scottish broom, is a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coronilla heterophylla include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Coronilla heterophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
